abilities.name: Lead From the Front
abilities.description: Once per encounter you may use Call Out as a Free Action on another character's turn, not just your own. Your voice carries even when it is not your moment.

abilities.name: Reckless Push
abilities.description: When you force a digivolution and the roll succeeds, your Digimon gains +3 to their next attack roll this round. Living dangerously pays off.

abilities.name: Burning Courage
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Courage rank 4
abilities.description: When your Digimon is digivolved above their Default Stage, they deal +2 bonus damage on every attack. The higher the risk, the harder they hit.

abilities.name: No Retreat
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Courage rank 4
abilities.description: When your Digimon hits 0 HP above Default Stage, before the cascade triggers you may spend 5 Hope to keep them at 1 HP and maintain their current stage until the end of this round. They are still in the fight.

abilities.name: Push the Limit
abilities.description: Your Digimon may now digivolve up to 3 stages above Default Stage instead of the normal 2 stage maximum. The Hope costs and corruption rules still apply. Some limits were made to be broken.
